paragraphs.es: Caminas alrededor de la cueva con mucho cuidado.
paragraphs.en: You walk around the cave very carefully.

paragraphs.es: Al otro lado, el bosque se abre. Hay una colina alta delante de ti.
paragraphs.en: On the other side, the forest opens up. There is a tall hill in front of you.

paragraphs.es: Desde aquí, puedes ver el río en la distancia. Hay algo que brilla cerca del agua.
paragraphs.en: From here, you can see the river in the distance. There is something that shines near the water.

choices.es: Subes a la colina para ver mejor.
choices.en: You climb the hill to see better.

choices.es: Vuelves atrás y tomas el camino del norte.
choices.en: You turn back and take the north path.
